source: NPCI Safety Bulletins, RBI Fraud Reports FY22-24, I4C reports

templates.opener: Dear customer, your SBI account will be suspended today due to incomplete KYC. Please share the OTP sent to your number to reactivate.
templates.escalation: This is URGENT. Your account will be permanently blocked in 10 minutes. Share OTP now.

templates.opener: Alert: Suspicious transaction of Rs 49,999 detected on your HDFC account. To reverse, share OTP immediately.
templates.escalation: The money will be transferred out in 5 minutes if you don't confirm. OTP please.

templates.opener: ICICI Bank: Your debit card will expire today. Share OTP to extend validity by 5 years.
templates.escalation: Only 15 minutes left before card deactivation. Please cooperate.

templates.opener: Income Tax Dept: Your refund of Rs 12,450 is ready. Share OTP received for processing credit.
templates.escalation: Refund will be cancelled if not claimed in 30 minutes.

templates.opener: Congratulations! You have won Rs 25,000 in the PNB customer lucky draw. Share OTP to claim.
templates.escalation: Prize expires today. Other winners are claiming. Hurry.

templates.opener: Dear customer, your KYC is incomplete. Update now at https://sbi-kyc-update.xyz to avoid account freeze.
templates.escalation: Last 24 hours remaining. Click the link or lose access permanently.

templates.opener: HDFC KYC verification pending. Complete in 2 hours: https://hdfc-kyc-gov.co. Non-compliance = account closure.
templates.escalation: RBI has mandated this. Refusal results in reporting to authorities.

templates.opener: RBI notice: Your bank KYC has failed verification. Re-verify PAN + Aadhaar: https://rbi-kyc-reverify.net
templates.escalation: Non-compliance leads to Rs 10,000 fine and account freeze.

templates.opener: Dear user, your Paytm KYC expires tomorrow. Update immediately or lose wallet balance: https://paytm-kyc.in-kyc.com
templates.escalation: Rs 15,000 in your wallet will be forfeited. 6 hours left.

templates.opener: PhonePe: Mandatory KYC update required per RBI. Scan QR and complete: https://phonepe-kyc.app
templates.escalation: Service suspension in 1 hour. Act now.

templates.opener: Hi, this is Rahul from EasyMoney Loans. Instant Rs 50,000 loan approved in 5 min. No documents. Click: https://easymoney-approve.in
templates.escalation: Processing fee Rs 499 only. Limited slots. Transfer and get loan.

templates.opener: Need urgent cash? Get Rs 2 lakh loan at 2% interest. Instant approval: https://quickloan-app.top
templates.escalation: Offer valid till midnight. Pay Rs 999 activation fee now.

templates.opener: Pre-approved loan of Rs 75,000 waiting. Last chance today: https://loanmitra.click
templates.escalation: Pay Rs 1,500 processing charge via UPI to account now. Loan disburses in 10 min.

templates.opener: Your previous loan EMI is overdue. Pay Rs 5,000 now via UPI or CIBIL score dropped by 200 points.
templates.escalation: Legal notice in 24 hours. Pay now to avoid recovery agent visit.

templates.opener: Bhai mein Ankit from CashNow. You had applied for loan 3 months back. Approved now! Share bank details to disburse.
templates.escalation: Rs 30,000 is ready in 10 min. Pay Rs 699 GST charge to my UPI ID.

templates.opener: Double your money in 30 days. Rs 10,000 becomes Rs 20,000 guaranteed. Limited slots. DM for details.
templates.escalation: Only 3 slots left. Transfer via UPI to start. Profit in 30 days certain.

templates.opener: I am SEBI-registered advisor. Crypto investment plan 40% monthly return. Join VIP Telegram: t.me/crypto-vip-india
templates.escalation: Minimum deposit Rs 5,000 via UPI. Doubles in 48 hours. Last 5 seats.

templates.opener: Stock tip: XYZ share will hit upper circuit tomorrow. I made Rs 2 lakh last week. Invest Rs 20,000 via my link.
templates.escalation: Price rises at 9:15 AM. Transfer to my account now or miss the profit.

templates.opener: PM Yojana 2026: Government investment scheme, 15% guaranteed return. Apply: https://pm-yojana-2026.gov-india.net
templates.escalation: Last date today. Register and deposit Rs 10,000 minimum.

templates.opener: Bhaiya namaste, main aapka purana colleague Sanjay. Ek amazing business mila hai. Rs 50,000 lagao, Rs 5 lakh 6 months mein.
templates.escalation: Trust me bhai. Main bhi kar raha hoon. UPI send kar do aaj.

templates.opener: Dear customer, your Amazon package is stuck at customs. Pay Rs 49 customs fee via UPI to release.
templates.escalation: Package will be returned in 2 hours. Send to 9876543210@upi immediately.

templates.opener: Flipkart: Delivery boy unable to find your address. Pay Rs 20 redelivery charge or order cancelled: https://flipkart-redelivery.co
templates.escalation: Order cancelled in 30 min. Rs 2,500 item forfeited.

templates.opener: Police Station Cyber Cell: Your Aadhaar linked to illegal activity. Call 9999888877 immediately or warrant issued.
templates.escalation: Share OTP to verify your Aadhaar. Refusal = arrest in 24 hours.

templates.opener: Hi beta, this is chacha. My phone is broken, using neighbor's. Emergency. Send Rs 10,000 to this UPI: 9876543210@ybl. Will return tomorrow.
templates.escalation: Hospital bill, need now. Please quickly.

templates.opener: Namaste, I am calling from SBI customer care, emp ID 45612. Your card blocked due to fraud attempt. Verify with OTP.
templates.escalation: Only I can help unblock. Share OTP within 5 min or escalate to branch.

templates.opener: Axis Bank: Unauthorized login detected from Mumbai. Share OTP to secure account.
templates.escalation: Rs 1 lakh transfer initiated. Stop it by sharing OTP NOW.

templates.opener: EPFO: Your PF withdrawal of Rs 2.3 lakh requires OTP verification. Share to complete.
templates.escalation: Withdrawal cancelled without OTP. 15 min remaining.

templates.opener: Kotak Bank reward: 5000 points converted to Rs 500 cashback. Share OTP to credit.
templates.escalation: Points expire at midnight. Act fast.

templates.opener: URGENT: Someone tried to withdraw Rs 75,000 from your ATM in Delhi. Share OTP to block the transaction.
templates.escalation: Transaction completes in 3 minutes. Speak fast.

templates.opener: BoB: Your UPI PIN will reset automatically. Share OTP to preserve it.
templates.escalation: Without OTP, you'll need to visit branch with 5 documents. Share now to skip.

templates.opener: Yes Bank: Aadhaar-PAN link failed. Re-link at https://yesbank-link.co to avoid tax penalty.
templates.escalation: Rs 1000 penalty from tomorrow if not linked today.

templates.opener: UIDAI: Your Aadhaar will be deactivated in 48 hrs. Update biometrics: https://uidai-biometric.org.in
templates.escalation: Without active Aadhaar, ration/LPG subsidy stops. Act now.

templates.opener: Canara Bank KYC flagged as suspicious. Verify now or FIR will be filed: https://canara-kyc.verify.in
templates.escalation: Police complaint in 12 hours. Click to prove innocence.

templates.opener: GPay KYC: Complete video KYC in 1 hour via this link: https://gpay-video-kyc.com. Mandatory per RBI.
templates.escalation: App access revoked if not completed. Tap now.

templates.opener: Union Bank: Your NRE account KYC pending. Update now: https://unionbank-nre-kyc.net
templates.escalation: Funds from abroad blocked until KYC done. 2 hrs left.

templates.opener: Sir/Madam, pre-approved Rs 1 lakh loan. No CIBIL check. 5 min approval: https://insta-loan-india.app
templates.escalation: Only Rs 599 processing fee. Disbursed in 10 min.

templates.opener: Low CIBIL? No problem. Rs 3 lakh personal loan at 1.5% monthly. Apply: https://cashbazaar-loan.in
templates.escalation: Fill form + pay Rs 799 verification fee. Approval guaranteed.

templates.opener: Business loan Rs 5 lakh approved. Transfer GST fee Rs 2,499 to activate disbursal.
templates.escalation: Approval expires in 45 min. UPI: loanagent@paytm

templates.opener: You defaulted on a loan you never took. Pay Rs 15,000 settlement via UPI or legal action proceeds.
templates.escalation: Arrest warrant being prepared. Pay immediately to drop case.

templates.opener: Namaste ji. Aapka loan sanctioned hai. Sirf PAN aur Aadhaar bhejo WhatsApp par. Rs 50k paisa aaj mil jayega.
templates.escalation: File fee Rs 299 UPI karo, loan 1 ghante mein aa jayega.

templates.opener: Join our trading group. Daily profit Rs 5,000 guaranteed. Whatsapp: +91-9876543210
templates.escalation: Deposit Rs 10,000 via UPI to master account. Start earning tomorrow.

templates.opener: IIT Mumbai alumnus here. AI-based trading algo. 20% monthly return. PM to invest.
templates.escalation: Minimum Rs 5,000. Limited to 100 members. Transfer via UPI.

templates.opener: Work from home: review products, earn Rs 2,000 daily. Visit https://earnbyreview.top
templates.escalation: Registration fee Rs 999. Start today, receive first payment in 24 hrs.

templates.opener: Forex trading opportunity. Rs 10,000 becomes Rs 1 lakh in 15 days. Last 2 slots.
templates.escalation: Transfer to UPI forex-pro@ibl. I'll guide the trade personally.

templates.opener: Government bond subsidy: Invest Rs 20,000 get Rs 40,000 guaranteed after 6 months. PM-approved.
templates.escalation: Only Indian citizens. Aadhaar + Rs 20,000 deposit today. Last day.

templates.opener: Hello sir, main SBI fraud team se hoon. Card block hua hai. Naya card dispatch karne ke liye card number aur CVV batao.
templates.escalation: Nayi card 24 ghante mein. CVV batana mandatory hai. Batao.

templates.opener: Zomato Customer Care: Your refund of Rs 487 stuck. Share UPI PIN to release.
templates.escalation: Refund returns to Zomato in 1 hour. Cooperate to receive.

templates.opener: FedEx courier: Parcel in your name found with 2kg drugs. DCP Mumbai contacting you. Pay Rs 25,000 settlement via UPI.
templates.escalation: Alternative: CBI case + jail. Pay 25k to drop case.

templates.opener: Papa, mera wallet chori ho gaya. College fees bharna hai aaj. Rs 15,000 please bhejo is UPI par: friend-help@okicici
templates.escalation: Warden waiting. Please urgent. Call nahi kar sakta, phone bhi gaya.

templates.opener: Electricity board: Your bill unpaid. Connection cut today at 6 PM. Pay Rs 3,400 to avoid: https://bseb-pay.co
templates.escalation: Pay via UPI immediately. Reconnection costs Rs 1,200 extra.
